comment: Crelia mod compatibility manifest. Mods listed here are explicitly tested/patched for regionized threading. Loader rejects unlisted mods in STRICT mode, warns in DEV mode.

supportedMods.notes: Sable sub-level cross-region + Create Aeronautics JNI audit
Core NeoForge runtime — region-aware event bus (Phase 1)
Vanilla — all server hooks patched through minecraft-patches

excludedMods.reason: Conflicts with Folia region threading — parallel chunk gen/scheduling on single-thread region model causes data races and crashes
